faqs.question: Why do Kew Gardens homes get drain flies?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic buildup found in drains, particularly in older Kew Gardens buildings with aging plumbing. Basement drains, bathroom sinks, and kitchen drains with decomposing organic matter create ideal breeding conditions for these pests.
